name: xf_cep_acc_multiupd_plain
drl:
rule W0 when accumulate( E(tag == "z"); $c : count() ) then end
rule W1 when accumulate( E(tag == "x", $t : ts) over window:time(150ms); $c : sum($t) ) then end
_finding: OPEN residual (D-155, pre-existing — fails on the pre-port base identically): same-epoch out-and-back DOUBLE-UPDATE of a plain-accumulate member (tag z->x->z) composed with a windowed sibling rule + a same-epoch insert: the oracle's entries evaluate against the epoch-FINAL bean (the member never leaves; count 2), the engine's immediate per-call processing sees the intermediate x state and its staged del+ins loses the member (count 1). The bare shape without the sibling/insert passes (multiupd control) — the composition is load-bearing (minimized from wf906x9). Same per-entry-deferral root as xf_cep_acc_updel_flush_*.
